Next we should examine the totn house both from the Lagna and
the Chandra (Moon). They represent among other things the
occupational activities of the person concerned and strong 10m houses
from the Lagna and the Chandra (Moon) are considered as one of the
arguments in favour of a successful career and fruitful life. A weak 10'-"
house proves the proposition and it is one of the factors which point to
the opposie and adverse conclusions regarding the occupation. If the
loth house both from the Lagna and the Chandra (Moon) are strong Of
weak the Astrologer's task becomes easy and simple. His opinions are
quiddy made; the findings are positive and the conclusions are absolute;
it howeV>er, both the lOth houses from the Lagna and the Chandra
